# ~~getSchemaShape()~~

> **Test Support Layer**

```ts
function getSchemaShape(schema: unknown): 
  | Record<string, unknown>
  | undefined;
```

Defined in: [src/app/testing/utility/mcp-server-introspection.utility.ts:119](https://github.com/EmperorRAG/first-mcp/blob/3d2831b148eaa4c84c57fa062fce6df920f72a50/src/app/testing/utility/mcp-server-introspection.utility.ts#L119)

Extracts the Zod schema `shape` from a tool's `inputSchema`
definition.

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type      | Description                                   |
| --------- | --------- | --------------------------------------------- |
| `schema`  | `unknown` | The raw schema object from a registered tool. |

## Returns

\| [`Record`](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/JavaScript/Reference)<`string`, `unknown`>
\| `undefined`

The shape record, or `undefined` if the schema structure
is unexpected.

## Deprecated

No longer imported by any test.  The Effect-TS
migration replaced Zod schemas with Effect Schema;
this accessor’s `def.shape` traversal no longer applies.

## Remarks

Navigates `schema.def.shape` via [getObjectProperty](../../reflect.utility/functions/getObjectProperty.md).
Returns `undefined` when the traversal encounters a missing or
non-object node.
